en: Network access to {hostname} is blocked by your organization's network egress settings. Telemetry events will not be exported. Add it under <link>network egress settings</link>.

zh: <bold>Skip all approvals is on.</bold> Claude can take actions without asking, including using connectors, browsing the web, and controlling apps on your computer. <link>See safe use tips</link>

zh: "{name}" is already installed. Installing this bundle will replace it.

zh: Trial ends in {daysRemaining, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}. Charges begin {chargeDate}. <link>Manage billing</link>

zh: Percentage of users who started at least one chat on {date} (UTC). Change is compared to the same day last week.

zh: Errors detected in schema. Settings may not work as expected. See the <link>Claude Code settings docs</link>.

zh: {count, plural, one {# session stuck} other {# sessions stuck}} — failed on 3 different runners each. Auto-recovery exhausted. Check runner logs, then retry or delete.

zh: Connect to {hostname} and grant Claude access to your repositories.

zh: Ensure you have appropriate permissions and trust third-party tools before continuing. <link>Learn more</link> about safely using research with connected apps.

zh: The United Kingdom’s general elections will be held on 4 July, 2024. Please visit the <link>UK Election Commission’s website</link> to get reliable, up-to-date, impartial guidance on how and where to vote in the United Kingdom’s general elections.

zh: GitHub access is required for Claude Code on the web. Enable it in <link>connector settings</link>.

zh: Claude is unable to respond to this request. Please <newChat>start a new chat</newChat>.

zh: Usage charges are billed separately. Your organization will be charged monthly for actual token consumption across all users. Admins can set spend limits at the organization, seat type, or individual user level to manage costs. <link>Token pricing can be found here.</link>

zh: Submit {count, plural, one {# comment} other {# comments}}

zh: This is a research preview. Start with tasks where mistakes are easy to fix. <link>Read safe use tips</link>

en: Bypass all permission checks and let Claude work uninterrupted. This works well for workflows like fixing lint errors or generating boilerplate code. Letting Claude run arbitrary commands is risky and can result in data loss, system corruption, or data exfiltration (e.g., via prompt injection attacks). <link>See best practices for safe usage</link>
zh: Bypass all permission checks and let Claude work uninterrupted. This works well for workflows like fixing lint errors or generating boilerplate code. Letting Claude run arbitrary commands is risky and can result in data loss, system corruption, or data exfiltration (e.g., via prompt injection attacks). <link>See best practices for safe usage</link>

en: Reset complete — deleted {count} trial(s), onboarding cleared: {cleared}
zh: Reset complete — deleted {count} trial(s), onboarding cleared: {cleared}

en: Unable to merge your changes to the {branch} branch.
zh: Unable to merge your changes to the {branch} branch.

en: <link>Install the GitHub App on {hostname}</link> to access its private repositories
zh: <link>Install the GitHub App on {hostname}</link> to access its private repositories

en: {collapsed, select, yes {On release} other {When a release is {verbs}}}
zh: {collapsed, select, yes {On release} other {When a release is {verbs}}}

en: Claude can access common package managers plus any additional domains you specify below. View package manager domains.
zh: Claude can access common package managers plus any additional domains you specify below. View package manager domains.

en: An unknown error occurred connecting to {serverName}.
zh: An unknown error occurred connecting to {serverName}.

en: {prefix, select, first {First, let’s} other {Now, let’s} last {Almost There! Let’s}} connect your work schedule.
zh: {prefix, select, first {First, let’s} other {Now, let’s} last {Almost There! Let’s}} connect your work schedule.

en: The desktop app should have downloaded automatically. If not, you can <link>download manually</link>.
zh: The desktop app should have downloaded automatically. If not, you can <link>download manually</link>.

en: Install the <link>GitHub CLI</link> to enable CI monitoring, auto-fix, and auto-merge.
zh: Install the <link>GitHub CLI</link> to enable CI monitoring, auto-fix, and auto-merge.

en: Your subscription includes a time-limited promotional discount. Your subscription will automatically renew at the discounted price of {discountedPrice} / {billingInterval, select, yearly {year} monthly {month} other {month}} (plus applicable taxes) until {promoEndDate} when it will automatically renew at the regular price of {undiscountedPrice} / {billingInterval, select, yearly {year} monthly {month} other {month}} (plus applicable taxes).
zh: Your subscription includes a time-limited promotional discount. Your subscription will automatically renew at the discounted price of {discountedPrice} / {billingInterval, select, yearly {year} monthly {month} other {month}} (plus applicable taxes) until {promoEndDate} when it will automatically renew at the regular price of {undiscountedPrice} / {billingInterval, select, yearly {year} monthly {month} other {month}} (plus applicable taxes).

en: You must verify {domain} before enabling discoverability for it.
zh: You must verify {domain} before enabling discoverability for it.

en: <link>Download Git for Windows</link>, or set the {envVar} environment variable to the full path of bash.exe from your Git for Windows install, then restart the app.
zh: <link>Download Git for Windows</link>, or set the {envVar} environment variable to the full path of bash.exe from your Git for Windows install, then restart the app.

en: Claude wants to send this to <bold>Claude Code</bold>
zh: Claude wants to send this to <bold>Claude Code</bold>

en: Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Claude. Change anytime in privacy settings. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>
zh: Allow the use of your chats and coding sessions to train and improve Claude. Change anytime in privacy settings. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>

en: Send events from {owner}/{repo} to an external URL. Requests are signed with a per-webhook secret.
zh: Send events from {owner}/{repo} to an external URL. Requests are signed with a per-webhook secret.

en: Anyone with @{emailDomain} email addresses can discover your workspace and request to join
zh: Anyone with @{emailDomain} email addresses can discover your workspace and request to join

en: Couldn't find plugin "{pluginName}". Browse available plugins below.
zh: Couldn't find plugin "{pluginName}". Browse available plugins below.

en: {count, plural, one {# new message} other {# new messages}}
zh: {count, plural, one {# new message} other {# new messages}}

en: You already are on the Enterprise plan. If you want to upgrade another organization, try <link>logging in with a different email</link>.
zh: You already are on the Enterprise plan. If you want to upgrade another organization, try <link>logging in with a different email</link>.

en: Team plans require a minimum of {minimum} seats
zh: Team plans require a minimum of {minimum} seats

en: Not seeing the email in your inbox? <link>Try sending again</link>.
zh: Not seeing the email in your inbox? <link>Try sending again</link>.

en: This setting can put your data at risk. <link>Learn more</link>
zh: This setting can put your data at risk. <link>Learn more</link>

en: Claude will take action without asking for permission. This can put your data at risk. <link>Learn more</link>
zh: Claude will take action without asking for permission. This can put your data at risk. <link>Learn more</link>

en: Please reach out to {supportEmailAddress} for assistance. We'll set you up with an API credit package.
zh: Please reach out to {supportEmailAddress} for assistance. We'll set you up with an API credit package.

en: Managed by your organization — copy details for your IT administrator.
zh: Managed by your organization — copy details for your IT administrator.

en: {count, number} {type, select, premium {Premium} chat_code {Chat + Claude Code} ss_ent {Claude Enterprise} chat {Chat} nonprofit {Nonprofit} premium_nonprofit {Premium Nonprofit} labs_standard {Research Labs} labs_premium {Research Labs Premium} other {Standard}}
zh: {count, number} {type, select, premium {Premium} chat_code {Chat + Claude Code} ss_ent {Claude Enterprise} chat {Chat} nonprofit {Nonprofit} premium_nonprofit {Premium Nonprofit} labs_standard {Research Labs} labs_premium {Research Labs Premium} other {Standard}}

en: Dispatch shows you the highlights. This background conversation is where Claude does the thinking. {goBack}
zh: Dispatch shows you the highlights. This background conversation is where Claude does the thinking. {goBack}

en: {toolName} · {count, plural, one {# tool call} other {# tool calls}}
zh: {toolName} · {count, plural, one {# tool call} other {# tool calls}}

en: You’re currently using a trial version of Pro. You’ll lose access on {trialEndDate}. Upgrade to keep these features.
zh: You’re currently using a trial version of Pro. You’ll lose access on {trialEndDate}. Upgrade to keep these features.

en:
Hey Claude, could you {prompt}? Use any connector that would be helpful, and get started once you've gathered enough info.

If it makes sense, create something we can look at together—like a visual, a checklist, or something interactive.
zh:
Hey Claude, could you {prompt}? Use any connector that would be helpful, and get started once you've gathered enough info.

If it makes sense, create something we can look at together—like a visual, a checklist, or something interactive.

en: Are you sure you want to remove verification for {domain}? This will disable SSO for users with this domain.
zh: Are you sure you want to remove verification for {domain}? This will disable SSO for users with this domain.

en: Limited support. Project memory and synced files (like Google Drive and GitHub files) won't be included.
zh: Limited support. Project memory and synced files (like Google Drive and GitHub files) won't be included.

en: As the primary owner, {fullName} will be able to:
zh: As the primary owner, {fullName} will be able to:

en: “{fileName}” is too large. Choose a smaller file.
zh: “{fileName}” is too large. Choose a smaller file.

en: Install the <link>GitHub App</link> to enable auto-fix and auto-merge.
zh: Install the <link>GitHub App</link> to enable auto-fix and auto-merge.

en: Anyone in {orgName} with repo access and the link can view
zh: Anyone in {orgName} with repo access and the link can view

en: failed on {failures}/3 {failures, plural, one {runner} other {runners}}, auto-recovering
zh: failed on {failures}/3 {failures, plural, one {runner} other {runners}}, auto-recovering

en: Using {extraUsageLink} for routine runs until limits reset.
zh: Using {extraUsageLink} for routine runs until limits reset.

en: They’ll be able to continue previous chats referencing {serverName} content, but Claude won’t be able to access new content or perform new tasks.
zh: They’ll be able to continue previous chats referencing {serverName} content, but Claude won’t be able to access new content or perform new tasks.

en: <bold>Review this prompt and its length carefully before approving.</bold>
zh: <bold>Review this prompt and its length carefully before approving.</bold>

en: Are you sure you want to dismiss this extra usage request from {name}? This action cannot be undone.
zh: Are you sure you want to dismiss this extra usage request from {name}? This action cannot be undone.

en: Define permissions, allowed directories and more for your entire org. This will override user and project settings and only applies to Claude Code in CLI and IDE. <link>Learn more</link>
zh: Define permissions, allowed directories and more for your entire org. This will override user and project settings and only applies to Claude Code in CLI and IDE. <link>Learn more</link>

en: Collapse {count, plural, one {# permission} other {# permissions}}
zh: Collapse {count, plural, one {# permission} other {# permissions}}

en: Let members choose "Always allow" when approving connector tools in Cowork. This increases risk from prompt injection — content from connected apps could cause Claude to take unintended actions without per-use approval. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>
zh: Let members choose "Always allow" when approving connector tools in Cowork. This increases risk from prompt injection — content from connected apps could cause Claude to take unintended actions without per-use approval. <learnMoreLink>Learn more</learnMoreLink>

en: Allow Claude to access common package managers to install packages and libraries for data analysis, visualizations, and file processing. View package manager domains. Monitor chats closely as this comes with security risks.
zh: Allow Claude to access common package managers to install packages and libraries for data analysis, visualizations, and file processing. View package manager domains. Monitor chats closely as this comes with security risks.

en: Are you sure you want to dismiss {count, plural, one {this join request} other {all join requests}}? This action cannot be undone.
zh: Are you sure you want to dismiss {count, plural, one {this join request} other {all join requests}}? This action cannot be undone.

en: Allow Claude to search for relevant details in past chats. Learn more.
zh: Allow Claude to search for relevant details in past chats. Learn more.

en: We emailed {name}'s gift to {toEmail}. You'll also get a confirmation at {fromEmail}.
zh: We emailed {name}'s gift to {toEmail}. You'll also get a confirmation at {fromEmail}.

en: Are you sure you want to dismiss {count, plural, one {this extra usage request} other {all extra usage requests}}? This action cannot be undone.
zh: Are you sure you want to dismiss {count, plural, one {this extra usage request} other {all extra usage requests}}? This action cannot be undone.

en: You're almost out of usage ∙ Resets at {time}
zh: You're almost out of usage ∙ Resets at {time}

en: Routine created, but the GitHub trigger couldn't be enabled for {count, plural, one {{repos}} other {{repos}}}. You can retry from the routine details page.
zh: Routine created, but the GitHub trigger couldn't be enabled for {count, plural, one {{repos}} other {{repos}}}. You can retry from the routine details page.

en: Your message will exceed the <link>maximum image count</link> for this chat. Try uploading {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} with fewer pages, removing images, <newChatLink>or starting a new conversation.</newChatLink>{upgradeInstructions}
zh: Your message will exceed the <link>maximum image count</link> for this chat. Try uploading {count, plural, one {# document} other {# documents}} with fewer pages, removing images, <newChatLink>or starting a new conversation.</newChatLink>{upgradeInstructions}

en: Your team's initial pool of usage. {editLink}
zh: Your team's initial pool of usage. {editLink}

en: Avoid financial transactions, password management, or anything involving sensitive personal data. Start with trusted sites and familiar workflows where you're comfortable having Claude take actions. Never use it for high-stakes decisions without careful supervision. And, of course, make sure your use complies with our <aupLink>acceptable use policy</aupLink>. <learnMore>Learn more</learnMore>
zh: Avoid financial transactions, password management, or anything involving sensitive personal data. Start with trusted sites and familiar workflows where you're comfortable having Claude take actions. Never use it for high-stakes decisions without careful supervision. And, of course, make sure your use complies with our <aupLink>acceptable use policy</aupLink>. <learnMore>Learn more</learnMore>

en: Return to your chats or <link>learn more about our research</link>.
zh: Return to your chats or <link>learn more about our research</link>.

en: Move {count, plural, one {# chat} other {# chats}}
zh: Move {count, plural, one {# chat} other {# chats}}

en: Also allows any {cliName} command that isn't listed separately in your connector settings
zh: Also allows any {cliName} command that isn't listed separately in your connector settings

en: Add skills to extend Claude's capabilities. <link>Learn more</link>
zh: Add skills to extend Claude's capabilities. <link>Learn more</link>

en: Projects will be deleted after {count, plural, one {# month} other {# months}} of inactivity
zh: Projects will be deleted after {count, plural, one {# month} other {# months}} of inactivity

en: There was an error logging in. If you believe you received this message in error, please <link>contact support</link>.
zh: There was an error logging in. If you believe you received this message in error, please <link>contact support</link>.

en: {sign}{count, plural, one {# premium seat} other {# premium seats}} (pro-rated year)
zh: {sign}{count, plural, one {# premium seat} other {# premium seats}} (pro-rated year)

en: Your first {n, plural, one {# Standard seat is} other {# Standard seats are}} free for {days} days. Premium and additional Standard seats are billed from today, prorated for the trial period — {dueToday} due now. After {date}, your total will be {recurring}/{interval} for {seatCount} seats (not including tax).
zh: Your first {n, plural, one {# Standard seat is} other {# Standard seats are}} free for {days} days. Premium and additional Standard seats are billed from today, prorated for the trial period — {dueToday} due now. After {date}, your total will be {recurring}/{interval} for {seatCount} seats (not including tax).

en: {count, plural, one {Refresh your repository} other {Refresh your # repositories}}
zh: {count, plural, one {Refresh your repository} other {Refresh your # repositories}}

en: Seats can be set up for extra usage once rate limits are hit. Extra usage is billed at API rates on an additional invoice. Admins can enable this and set spend limits in Settings. <link>Token pricing can be found here.</link>
zh: Seats can be set up for extra usage once rate limits are hit. Extra usage is billed at API rates on an additional invoice. Admins can enable this and set spend limits in Settings. <link>Token pricing can be found here.</link>

zh: Allow Claude to permanently delete files in your {folderName} folder during this task?

zh: Your Microsoft Entra Admin must complete setup steps before team members can connect their Microsoft 365 accounts. <link>View the full setup guide</link> for step-by-step instructions.

zh: {minimum, plural, one {# seat} other {# seats}} minimum

zh: {featureName} supports Intel-based Macs in a newer release. Please update Claude Desktop.

zh: Settings must follow the <link>Claude Code settings schema</link>. Invalid settings may disable Claude Code for your organization.

zh: Failed to add {count, plural, one {# repository} other {# repositories}}. You can try again.

zh: No {orgType} organizations available with matching domains

zh: {sessions, plural, one {# active session} other {# active sessions}} on this runner will be interrupted and returned to the queue with a failure status.

zh: You're now using extra usage ∙ Your cowork limit resets {day} at {time}

en: You’re currently using a trial version of Pro. You’ll be billed at the standard Pro rate on {billingStartDate}.
zh: You’re currently using a trial version of Pro. You’ll be billed at the standard Pro rate on {billingStartDate}.

en: Press ⌥ option twice to type to Claude
zh: Press ⌥ option twice to type to Claude

zh: You can <link>delete your conversations with Claude</link>, which will also delete any Gmail data Claude used in that conversation

zh: Need one? <link>Create a token on github.com</link>

zh: Delete “{name}”? This will also delete {count} past runs. This can't be undone.

zh: The amount you paid for unused extra usage ({amount}, before tax) will be refunded to your card.

en: Please try again. If that doesn't work, contact your account administrator or <link>Anthropic support</link>.
zh: Please try again. If that doesn't work, contact your account administrator or <link>Anthropic support</link>.

en: Always allowing these actions carries risks. Content from files, emails, and the web can contain malicious instructions. Reviewing each action helps you catch Claude errors and malicious actions. Learn about safety risks.
zh: Always allowing these actions carries risks. Content from files, emails, and the web can contain malicious instructions. Reviewing each action helps you catch Claude errors and malicious actions. Learn about safety risks.

zh: Install the Claude GitHub App on {repo} to use webhook triggers, or pick a different repository.

zh: Your Claude {tier} plan is good through {endDate}.

zh: {sign}{count, plural, one {# Chat seat} other {# Chat seats}} (pro-rated month)

zh: You've used {surpassedThresholdFormatted} of your weekly limit

zh: The amount you paid for unused extra usage ({amount}, before tax) will also be refunded to your card.

zh: You are about to renew the {planName} subscription for {organizationName} as a <bold>monthly</bold> plan.

zh: Your organization's access policy blocks {serverName}. Contact your IT admin to adjust the policy for this connector.
